nasb.text: “You shall bring out much seed to the field but you will gather in little, for the locust will consume it.

esv.text: You shall carry much seed into the field and shall gather in little, for the locust shall consume it.

cnv.text: “你帶到田間的種子雖然很多，但收進來的卻很少，因為蝗蟲把它吞吃了。

ccb.text: “你们种的多，却收的少，因为庄稼必被蝗虫吃掉。
